finding: A full 10-role L5 run was needed to discover that OpenAI generation quota was exhausted, even though provider credentials and model listing were valid. Eight Anthropic calls completed before the overall command failed on two OpenAI 429 responses.
expectedBehavior: Paid multi-provider execution should optionally perform one minimal generation/quota probe per provider before launching the full role roster, report estimated call count, and require explicit continuation after a billing failure.
evidenceOrRepro: Final run `team-27b16b429317` reached both vendors; Anthropic was 8/8 HTTP 200 and OpenAI was 2/2 HTTP 429 `insufficient_quota`.
followUp: Add a redacted paid-preflight mode that distinguishes authentication, model access, request schema, quota, and role execution readiness.
